title: populations many/count/max
manager: Populations — `many X via factory count E max N` — declare a dynamic group of machines built from a factory, with a required maximum so the system stays finite and checkable. This is how you model "a fleet of workers" or "one session per user" without hand-instantiating each: declare the population, and the required max is what keeps it inside the verifiable band instead of exploding to infinity.
cs: `many X via factory count E max N` (§22); max required for finiteness; built from a factory (W7.24); members are spawn/retire managed (W7.18).
